message:
Dear {{ doc.applicant_name }},

{% if doc.designation %}

I hope you are doing well. We would like to invite you to an interview for the {{ doc.designation }} position at phamos GmbH.

{% else %}

I hope you are doing well. We would like to invite you to an interview for the job at phamos GmbH.

{% endif %}

Please follow link below and Pick a slot for Interview.The interview will take place online on selected timeslot.

{{frappe.utils.get_url()}}/schedule_interview/{{doc.name}}

Looking forward to speaking with you!

Best regards,

Philipp Gutstein Head of HR
name: Job interview Slot Booking
subject: Job interview slot booking
